childElements.name: Btn_ViewOpportunity
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "iconName" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "iconVariant" : "", "label" : "View Opportunity", "loginAction" : "login", "message" : { }, "objectAction" : "home", "pubsub" : false, "recordAction" : "view", "replace" : false, "show" : null, "ssm" : false, "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "", "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "targetName" : "", "targetType" : "Web Page", "targetUrl" : "/grantmaking1/s/funding-opportunity/%aiSuggestedCards:id%", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "variant" : "brand", "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: isSelectedAvailable
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "defaultValue" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "hide" : false, "label" : "Select this funding program", "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : false, "show" : null }

childElements.name: Txt_OpportunityCard
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_OpportunityCard", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "
Einstein Suggested

%aiSuggestedCards:name%

%aiSuggestedCards:EligibilitySummary%
Open
%aiSuggestedCards:OpenDate%
Close
%aiSuggestedCards:CloseDate%
Max Award
$%aiSuggestedCards:MaxAwardAmount%
%aiSuggestedCards:RelevanceLabel% (%aiSuggestedCards:relevanceScore%)
FundingOpportunity Id: %aiSuggestedCards:id%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: aiSuggestedCards
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "collapse" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "hide" : false, "label" : "Recommended Opportunities", "repeat" : true, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:0:name%))" }

childElements.name: isSelected
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "defaultValue" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "hide" : false, "label" : "Select this funding program", "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : false, "show" : null }

childElements.name: Txt_AvailableOpportunityRow
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AvailableOpportunityRow", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

%availableFundingCards:name%

%availableFundingCards:EligibilitySummary%
Open
%availableFundingCards:OpenDate%
Close
%availableFundingCards:CloseDate%
Max Award
$%availableFundingCards:MaxAwardAmount%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: availableFundingCards
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "collapse" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "hide" : false, "label" : "All Available Funding Opportunities", "repeat" : true, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:0:name%))" }

childElements.name: Txt_KeywordBadge
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_KeywordBadge", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "
%keywordItems%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: keywordItems
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "collapse" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "hide" : false, "label" : "Key Topics Identified", "repeat" : true, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%keywordItems%))" }

childElements.name: PrepareFundingFinderData
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "elementValueMap" : { "aiSuggestedCards" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities%)),%fundingOpportunities%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities%)),%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%analysisResult:fundingOpportunities%)),%analysisResult:fundingOpportunities%,%AnalyzeProjectApex:fundingOpportunities%)))", "availableFundingCards" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities%)),%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities%)),%fundingOpportunities%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%AnalyzeProjectApex:fundingOpportunities%)),%AnalyzeProjectApex:fundingOpportunities%,%fundingSearch%)))", "keywordItems" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%keywords%)),%keywords%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:keywords%)),%initialAiAssessment:keywords%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%analysisResult:keywords%)),%analysisResult:keywords%,%AnalyzeProjectApex:keywords%)))", "recommendedFundingTypeItems" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%recommendedFundingTypes%)),%recommendedFundingTypes%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:recommendedFundingTypes%)),%initialAiAssessment:recommendedFundingTypes%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%analysisResult:recommendedFundingTypes%)),%analysisResult:recommendedFundingTypes%,%AnalyzeProjectApex:recommendedFundingTypes%)))", "singleAiName" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:name%)),%aiSuggestedCards:name%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:name%)),%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:name%,%fundingOpportunities:name%))", "singleAiOpenDate" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:OpenDate%)),%aiSuggestedCards:OpenDate%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:OpenDate%)),%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:OpenDate%,%fundingOpportunities:OpenDate%))", "singleAiCloseDate" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:CloseDate%)),%aiSuggestedCards:CloseDate%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:CloseDate%)),%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:CloseDate%,%fundingOpportunities:CloseDate%))", "singleAiAward" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:MaxAwardAmount%)),%aiSuggestedCards:MaxAwardAmount%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%)),%fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%,%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%))", "singleAiEligibility" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:EligibilitySummary%)),%aiSuggestedCards:EligibilitySummary%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:EligibilitySummary%)),%fundingOpportunities:EligibilitySummary%,%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:EligibilitySummary%))", "singleAiRelevanceColor" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:RelevanceColor%)),%aiSuggestedCards:RelevanceColor%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:RelevanceColor%)),%fundingOpportunities:RelevanceColor%,%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:RelevanceColor%))", "singleAiRelevanceLabel" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSuggestedCards:RelevanceLabel%)),%aiSuggestedCards:RelevanceLabel%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:RelevanceLabel%)),%fundingOpportunities:RelevanceLabel%,%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:RelevanceLabel%))", "singleAvailableName" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:name%)),%availableFundingCards:name%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingOpportunities:name%)),%availableFundingOpportunities:name%,%singleAiName%))", "singleAvailableOpenDate" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:OpenDate%)),%availableFundingCards:OpenDate%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingOpportunities:OpenDate%)),%availableFundingOpportunities:OpenDate%,%singleAiOpenDate%))", "singleAvailableCloseDate" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:CloseDate%)),%availableFundingCards:CloseDate%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingOpportunities:CloseDate%)),%availableFundingOpportunities:CloseDate%,%singleAiCloseDate%))", "singleAvailableAward" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:MaxAwardAmount%)),%availableFundingCards:MaxAwardAmount%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%)),%availableFundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%,%singleAiAward%))", "singleAvailableEligibility" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingCards:EligibilitySummary%)),%availableFundingCards:EligibilitySummary%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%availableFundingOpportunities:EligibilitySummary%)),%availableFundingOpportunities:EligibilitySummary%,%singleAiEligibility%))", "aiSummary" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%aiSummary%)),%aiSummary%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:aiSummary%)),%initialAiAssessment:aiSummary%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%analysisResult:aiSummary%)),%analysisResult:aiSummary%,%AnalyzeProjectApex:aiSummary%)))", "confidenceScore" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%confidenceScore%)),%confidenceScore%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:confidenceScore%)),%initialAiAssessment:confidenceScore%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%analysisResult:confidenceScore%)),%analysisResult:confidenceScore%,%AnalyzeProjectApex:confidenceScore%)))", "projectPurposeText" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%Step_ProjectDiscovery:Inp_ProjectDescription%)),%Step_ProjectDiscovery:Inp_ProjectDescription%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:projectDescription%)),%initialAiAssessment:projectDescription%,%context:projectDescription%))", "applicationIntakeContext:initialAiAssessment" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment%)),%initialAiAssessment%,%analysisResult%)" }, "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_RecommendedFundingTypeBadge", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "
%recommendedFundingTypeItems%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: recommendedFundingTypeItems
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "collapse" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "hide" : false, "label" : "Recommended Funding Categories", "repeat" : true, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%recommendedFundingTypeItems%))" }

childElements.name: Txt_AiOpportunity_1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AiOpportunity_1", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:0:name%))", "text" : "

%fundingOpportunities:0:name%

Open: %fundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate% | Close: %fundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%fundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount% | Relevance: %fundingOpportunities:0:relevanceScore%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_AiOpportunity_2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AiOpportunity_2", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:1:name%))", "text" : "

%fundingOpportunities:1:name%

Open: %fundingOpportunities:1:OpenDate% | Close: %fundingOpportunities:1:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%fundingOpportunities:1:MaxAwardAmount% | Relevance: %fundingOpportunities:1:relevanceScore%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_AiOpportunity_3
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AiOpportunity_3", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:2:name%))", "text" : "

%fundingOpportunities:2:name%

Open: %fundingOpportunities:2:OpenDate% | Close: %fundingOpportunities:2:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%fundingOpportunities:2:MaxAwardAmount% | Relevance: %fundingOpportunities:2:relevanceScore%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_AiOpportunity_4
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AiOpportunity_4", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:3:name%))", "text" : "

%fundingOpportunities:3:name%

Open: %fundingOpportunities:3:OpenDate% | Close: %fundingOpportunities:3:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%fundingOpportunities:3:MaxAwardAmount% | Relevance: %fundingOpportunities:3:relevanceScore%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_AiOpportunity_5
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AiOpportunity_5", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%fundingOpportunities:4:name%))", "text" : "

%fundingOpportunities:4:name%

Open: %fundingOpportunities:4:OpenDate% | Close: %fundingOpportunities:4:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%fundingOpportunities:4:MaxAwardAmount% | Relevance: %fundingOpportunities:4:relevanceScore%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_AnalysisResultDebug
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AnalysisResultDebug", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "true", "text" : "
TEMP DEBUG (remove before release)
root funding[0].name: %fundingOpportunities:0:name%
step aiSuggested[0].name: %aiSuggestedCards:0:name%
step available[0].name: %availableFundingCards:0:name%
initial assessment[0].name: %initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:name%
keywords[0]: %keywords:0% | step keywords[0]: %keywordItems:0%
recommendedTypes[0]: %recommendedFundingTypes:0% | step recommendedTypes[0]: %recommendedFundingTypeItems:0%
confidenceScore: %confidenceScore% | aiSummary length check: %aiSummary%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_BuildStampResults
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_BuildStampResults", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "
Build GSC-INTAKE-B1018 | Updated 2026-03-16 18:03 ET
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_FundingFinderSummary
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_FundingFinderSummary", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

Powered by Einstein AI

Project Purpose: %Step_ProjectDiscovery:Inp_ProjectDescription%

AI Summary: %aiSummary%

Confidence: %confidenceScore%

Einstein Suggested Opportunities
All Available Funding Opportunities
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_SingleAiOpportunityFallback
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_SingleAiOpportunityFallback", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "false", "text" : "
Einstein Suggested

%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:name%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:name%%fundingOpportunities:0:name%%fundingOpportunities:name%

Open: %initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:OpenDate%%fundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate%%fundingOpportunities:OpenDate% | Close: %initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:CloseDate%%fundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate%%fundingOpportunities:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%%fundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount%%fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_SingleAvailableOpportunityFallback
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_SingleAvailableOpportunityFallback", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "false", "text" : "

%availableFundingOpportunities:0:name%%availableFundingOpportunities:name%%fundingOpportunities:0:name%%fundingOpportunities:name%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:name%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:name%

Open: %availableFundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate%%availableFundingOpportunities:OpenDate%%fundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate%%fundingOpportunities:OpenDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:OpenDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:OpenDate% | Close: %availableFundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate%%availableFundingOpportunities:CloseDate%%fundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate%%fundingOpportunities:CloseDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:CloseDate%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:CloseDate% | Max Award: $%availableFundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount%%availableFundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%%fundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount%%fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:MaxAwardAmount%%initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:MaxAwardAmount%
", "textKey" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step_FundingFinder
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "chartLabel" : "AI Funding Analysis", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "instruction" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "knowledgeOptions" : { "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "keyword" : "", "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "label" : "AI Funding Analysis", "message" : { }, "nextLabel" : "Start Application Intake", "nextWidth" : 3, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "pubsub" : false, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "validationRequired" : true, "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: Inp_ApplicantEmail
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "Applicant Email", "maxLength" : 120, "minLength" : 0, "placeholder" : "name@organization.org", "readOnly" : false, "required" : true, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: Inp_ApplicantFullName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "Applicant Full Name", "maxLength" : 120, "minLength" : 0, "placeholder" : "Enter applicant full name", "readOnly" : false, "required" : true, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: Inp_OrganizationName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "Organization Name", "maxLength" : 160, "minLength" : 0, "placeholder" : "Enter organization or agency name", "readOnly" : false, "required" : true, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: Inp_UseOfFunds
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "defaultValue" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "How will you use the requested funds?", "maxLength" : 4000, "minLength" : 0, "placeholder" : "Describe planned fund usage, timeline, and expected outcomes.", "readOnly" : false, "required" : true, "rows" : 8, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: PrepareSelectedFundingForApplication
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "elementValueMap" : { "selectedFundingCards" : "=%aiSuggestedCards%" }, "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : false, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false }

childElements.name: Txt_SelectedFundingCard
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_SelectedFundingCard", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=OR(%selectedFundingCards:isSelected%=true,%selectedFundingCards:isSelectedAvailable%=true)", "text" : "
%selectedFundingCards:name% | Close: %selectedFundingCards:CloseDate%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: selectedFundingCards
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "collapse" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "hide" : false, "label" : "Selected Funding Programs", "repeat" : true, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "show" : "=NOT(ISBLANK(%selectedFundingCards%))" }

childElements.name: Txt_ApplicationIntakeIntro
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_ApplicationIntakeIntro", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

Grant Application Intake

Complete this intake for the funding programs you selected. Your AI assessment and project purpose are already attached for reviewer context.

", "textKey" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step_GrantApplicationIntake
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "chartLabel" : "Grant Application Intake", "completeLabel" : "Submit Intake", "completeMessage" : "Submit this application intake?", "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "instruction" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "knowledgeOptions" : { "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "keyword" : "", "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "label" : "Grant Application Intake", "message" : { }, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "pubsub" : false, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "validationRequired" : true, "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: AnalyzeProject
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "enableActionMessage" : true, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "extraPayload" : { }, "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "inProgressMessage" : "Einstein is analyzing your project...", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Data_FundingOpportunitySearch", "label" : "Analyze & Continue", "message" : { }, "postMessage" : "Debug: Integration Procedure response received.", "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "", "pubsub" : false, "redirectNextLabel" : "", "redirectNextWidth" : 0, "redirectPageName" : "Step_FundingFinder", "redirectPreviousLabel" : "", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 0, "redirectTemplateUrl" : "", "remoteOptions" : { "chainable" : false, "postTransformBundle" : "", "preTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONNode" : "response", "responseJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : false, "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "svgIcon" : "einstein", "svgSprite" : "utility", "useContinuation" : false, "validationRequired" : "Submit", "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: Inp_ProjectDescription
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : true, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "debounceValue" : 0, "defaultValue" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "Describe your project", "maxLength" : 5000, "minLength" : 0, "pattern" : "", "placeholder" : "Explain your project goals, the community impact, and what type of funding you are seeking.", "ptrnErrText" : "", "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : true, "rows" : 14, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: Txt_AnalyzeError
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_AnalyzeError", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "=AND(%context:analysisSuccess%=false,NOT(ISBLANK(%context:analysisErrorMessage%)))", "text" : "
%context:analysisErrorMessage%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_BuildStampDiscovery
childElements.propertySetConfig:

childElements.name: Txt_DiscoveryDebug
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_DiscoveryDebug", "sanitize" : false, "show" : "true", "text" : "
TEMP DEBUG (Discovery)
Inp_ProjectDescription: %Inp_ProjectDescription%
root funding[0].id: %fundingOpportunities:0:id%
root funding[0].name: %fundingOpportunities:0:name%
initial assessment funding[0].id: %initialAiAssessment:fundingOpportunities:0:id%
analysisSuccess: %analysisSuccess% | analysisErrorMessage: %analysisErrorMessage%
", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.name: Txt_ProjectDiscoveryIntro
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "Txt_ProjectDiscoveryIntro", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

AI-Powered Grant Discovery

Describe your project and we'll recommend the best funding opportunities.

", "textKey" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Step_ProjectDiscovery
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "allowSaveForLater" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "chartLabel" : "Project Discovery", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "instruction" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "knowledgeOptions" : { "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "keyword" : "", "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "label" : "Project Discovery", "message" : { }, "nextLabel" : "", "nextWidth" : 3, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "pubsub" : false, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "validationRequired" : true, "wpm" : false }
